entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum) susceptible to head smut disease

entities.name: TOLYPOSPORIUM PENICILLARIAE
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes head smut disease

entities.name: HEAD SMUT
entities.description: A devastating fungal disease affecting the heads of pearl millet

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, which is reduced by head smut

entities.name: DISEASE INCIDENCE
entities.description: The frequency or occurrence of head smut in the crop population

entities.name: DISEASE SEVERITY
entities.description: The extent of damage caused by head smut on the affected plants

entities.name: KOIBATEK
entities.description: A research site in Kenya where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: MARIGAT
entities.description: A research site in Kenya where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the pearl millet genotypes were tested

entities.name: COMPLETE RANDOMIZED BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to plant the test germplasm

entities.name: FUNGICIDE SPRAY
entities.description: A control method used to manage head smut disease for yield loss assessment

entities.name: PATH COEFFICIENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze the relationship between disease and yield losses
